ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry record was last updated */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a sector to categorize the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workforce_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workforce distribution record */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "total_workforce" INTEGER /* Total number of workers in the industry */,
  "small_organizations" INTEGER /* Number of workers in small-sized organizations */,
  "large_organizations" INTEGER /* Number of workers in large-sized organizations */,
  "unknown_organizations" INTEGER /* Number of workers in organizations of unknown size */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workforce distribution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workforce distribution record was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data version to track changes over time */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the workforce data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_distribution_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_distribution_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization size category */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization size category (e.g., Small, Large, Unknown) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization size category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization size record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organization size record was last updated */,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the number of employees for the size category */,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the number of employees for the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role record was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a team to group users into teams */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file record was last updated */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workforce distribution record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES workforce_distribution ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
